CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Type picklist values to exclude from Contact-level rollup calculations. Opportunities matching these Types will not count toward Contact donation totals or other rollup fields. Leave blank to include all Types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Type values to exclude when rolling up donation statistics to Contacts. Enter Type values separated by semicolons.
CustomField.label: Opp Types Excluded for Contact Rollup
